---
title: "6.6 Exercise 4"
author: "Camilla Rosour"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
data <- tibble(grp = c("A", "A", "B", "B"),
       sex = c("F", "M", "F", "M"),
       meanL = c(0.225, 0.47, 0.325, 0.547),
       sdL = c(0.106, 0.325, 0.106, 0.308),
       meanR = c(0.34, 0.57, 0.4, 0.647),
       sdR = c(0.0849, 0.325, 0.0707, 0.274)
       )
```

Exercise 4:

```{r}
 ex_4 <- data |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(-grp, -sex),
               names_to = "cats",
               values_to = "vals"
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(sex, cats),
              values_from = vals,
              names_sep = ".")
print(ex_4)
```
